auth.subtitle: Google fayyadamuu ykn emailtiin geessitu erguu.
auth.magicDescription: Geessitu yeroo tokko qofa ergina. Yeroo gabaabaa booda ni dhuma.
auth.magicSentBody: Geessitu seenaa ergine. Seenaa booda taba kana cufuu dandeessa.
auth.legalNotice: Waryt CRM — itti fufuun hojii hayyamame qofaaf fayyadamuu kee mirkaneessa.
auth.magicLinkConfigError: Supabase build kana irratti hin qindeessine.
auth.magicLinkNetworkHint: .env.local keessatti NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL fi NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY mirkaneessi, sarvarii fooyyessi, gara Supabase dashboarditti deebi'uu URL mirkaneessi.
